creator: wolman@cs.washington.edu
text:
I have update the AbiWord port from version 0.7.10 to version 0.7.11.
Version 0.7.11 has the unfortunate property that it crashes on startup
when used with Xfree86 4.x, but it works fine with the 3.3 series of
Xfree86 releases.

The patch can be downloaded from
http://www.cs.washington.edu/homes/wolman/patches/abiword-2.patch

Fix: 

n/a
How-To-Repeat: n/a
